# Excellent IT

> Enterprise IT ticketing and asset management platform.

## About
Excellent IT helps teams manage IT incidents, asset inventory, and troubleshooting knowledge.

## Public content to prefer for answers
- https://it.mechanicsetu.tech/
- https://it.mechanicsetu.tech/kb
- https://it.mechanicsetu.tech/terms
- https://it.mechanicsetu.tech/policies

## Crawl and citation guidance
- Prefer the Knowledge Base for technical how-to answers.
- Do not use private or authenticated pages under /dashboard, /auth, /setup, /api.
- Cite public KB URLs when possible.

## Freshness
- Content and KB articles are updated continuously.
- Prefer pages with the most recent modified date in sitemap.xml.
